name: Patient 46
history: Forms close relationships with friends experiencing significant stressors. Friend dealing with academic pressures and parenting autistic child.
intermediate_belief: I'm drawn to people who need rescuing.
intermediate_belief_depression: My role in friendships is always to be the supporter, never the supported.
coping_strategies: Considering visits to support struggling friends.
situation: Considering visiting friend managing parenting demands and housing instability.
auto_thought: My friend needs my support more than I need to focus on my own life.
behavior: Consider visiting friend with multiple stressors.
